decisions.summary: P0-P3 audit-window improvements are intentionally bundled for one runtime-contract PR
decisions.reason: The four designed stories share the same audit-window contract and the same runtime seams: [REDACTED:b3ae548f7af6], session attribution in audit/pr prepare, judgment-axis activation precision, and PR traceability artifacts. Splitting them would force duplicate design-ssot, responsibility-authority, common-spine, and Agent Review evidence while making the dogfood audit behavior harder to validate end-to-end. The bundled diff remains reviewable because production code changes are concentrated in src/session-efficiency-audit.js, src/pr-manager.js, src/cli.js, and focused regression tests; the additional files are Story/Architecture/Spec lineage for those four additive gates.

decisions.summary: Bundled scope is reviewable by one reviewer
decisions.reason: The diff is broad in documentation count but narrow in product behavior: it adds one CLI memory guard, advisory attribution metadata, a judgment-axis precision precondition, and PR artifact traceability. Tests and design-ssot evidence are focused on these shared seams, so splitting would duplicate the same evidence and make the audit-window contract harder to review.
